name: Chocolate Dessert Ball
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the softened cream cheese, melted chocolate chips, creme de menthe, and cinnamon.
2. Blend all ingredients together until smooth.
3. Chill the mixture for at least 2 hours.
4. Form the chilled mixture into a ball.
5. Roll the ball in chopped pecans.
6. Serve with chocolate wafer cookies.
